case_title: NATIONAL CREDIT ADJUSTERS LLC VS. JENNIFER L. BOSTROM et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR FEB-25-2014 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF NATIONAL CREDIT ADJUSTERS LLC AS TO DEFENDANT BOSTROM, JENNIFER L. DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  DEC-02-2013
NON SERVICE RETURN RE: SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF NATIONAL CREDIT ADJUSTERS LLC
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF FEB-25-2014 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
